personality_one_liner: A highly readable, trustworthy, and high-contrast digital ledger designed for Indian small business owners.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room for high readability. Use md (12pt) and lg (16pt) for most paddings. Touch targets must be at least 44pt.

dont's: Do not use glass effects on ledger data screens. Clarity and performance are priority for this demographic.

screens.name: PIN Login
screens.purpose: Secure the app with a 4-digit PIN for shop owner privacy.

states.error: Shake animation on PIN dots, red text 'Incorrect PIN'.

screens.layout: Large MS Logo at the top. 'Enter your 4-digit PIN' text. 4 large dots indicating PIN entry. Custom oversized numeric keypad taking up the bottom 50% of the screen. 'Forgot PIN?' subtle text button at the bottom.

screens.name: Home Dashboard
screens.purpose: Provide a bird's-eye view of total money to give and receive, and list all parties.

states.loading: Skeleton of summary cards and list.
states.empty: Illustration of a shopkeeper with 'Add your first customer to get started' and a prominent CTA.
states.error: Centered 'Failed to load ledger' with retry button.

screens.layout: Header with 'Mayank Store' and a settings icon. Below header, two large summary cards side-by-side or stacked: 'You will Give' (Red text, Error color) and 'You will Get' (Green text, Success color). A search bar to find parties. A list of parties showing Name, Date of last tx, and Net Balance (color-coded red/green). A floating action button (FAB) or sticky bottom button to 'Add Party'.

screens.name: Party Detail
screens.purpose: Show transaction history for a specific customer/supplier and allow adding new entries.

states.empty: No transactions yet. 'Add your first entry below.'

screens.layout: Header with Party Name and Phone icon. Top summary card showing their current net balance (Red/Green) and 'Send Reminder' button (WhatsApp/SMS). Scrollable list of transactions (Date, Note, Amount with Give/Got indicator). Two sticky 50% width buttons at the very bottom: 'You Gave / ₹' (Red CTA) and 'You Got / ₹' (Green CTA).

screens.name: Add Transaction
screens.purpose: Enter amount, date, and note for a Give or Got transaction.
screens.layout: Modal sheet or stack screen. Large numeric input field (₹ 0). Text input for 'Add Note (Item name/Bill no)'. Date picker row (defaults to Today). Sticky 'Save' button at the bottom (Red if Giving, Green if Getting).

screens.name: Settings
screens.purpose: Manage app preferences like Language and PIN.
screens.layout: List layout. Toggle for 'Language (English / Hindi)'. Row to 'Change PIN'. Row to 'Generate Monthly PDF Report'. Standard chevron list item pattern.

shopkeeper_empty_state.alt: Indian kirana store shopkeeper for empty state

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color scheme for financial trust: 'success' (Green #16A34A) for RECEIVABLES (You will get), and 'error' (Red #DC2626) for PAYABLES (You will give). Do not mix these up. This is critical for Indian ledger apps.
Do not use ANY blue or purple. The brand color is deep orange (#E05A33).
Use large, high-contrast typography. The target audience (shopkeepers) needs to read amounts clearly at a glance.
Implement a custom oversized numeric keypad for the PIN login screen. It should be highly tactile.
On the Party Detail screen, anchor two large buttons at the bottom: a red 'You Gave' button and a green 'You Got' button. They must be sticky above the safe area so they are always accessible.
Use Hindi translations where applicable if the toggle is activated, or mock the translation layer with a placeholder switch.
Ensure amounts are formatted with the Indian Rupee symbol (₹).
No glassmorphism. This app requires a solid, fast, utility-first UI typical of KhataBook or OkCredit.
Use the 'ms_logo' image for the app header/login screen to personalize it for 'Mayank Store'.
